title: Optional Pickup
description: Pick up items with your own choice.
body:
## About
### Optional Pickup
- This mod provide you with full access to items dropped on the ground.   
- And the _vanilla auto pickup mechanic_ was removed!
- You can now choose which specific item to pick up with a fresh-looking **GUI item list**.
![Main1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ed3b938a9d49fad80c1ff8da851bbdcfa701234.png)
- The effective scan range is 1 block (Similar to vanilla).
 ![Main2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12b1695e79b75c076d5fa492f13c01d83d18e6c.png)
- You can scroll the pick up item list by sneaking!
- Press **R** to pick up the item you selected (Configurable).
- Recommend using [Item Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/itemphysic-lite) for better immersion.
- More version support on the way!
- Idea inspired by **Genshin Impact**.
